tools.name: hotels.search
tools.description: Use this when the user wants to find hotels at a destination. Do not use for flight searches or for fetching rooms for a specific hotel - use hotels.list_rooms for that.

tools.name: flights.search
tools.description: Use this when the user wants to search for available flights between two locations. Do not use for hotel searches, car rentals, or other non-flight travel.

tools.name: hotels.list_rooms
tools.description: Use this only after hotels.search has been called and the user has selected a specific hotel from the results. Requires a hotelId from a previous hotels.search response. Do not use to search for hotels across a destination, and do not call this without a hotelId - use hotels.search first.
